name: Ceramic Non-Stick Frying Pan 28cm
description: PFOA-free ceramic non-stick frying pan with Stay-Cool handle, induction compatible, and oven safe to 220°C.

reviews.title: Excellent non-stick performance
reviews.reviewText: Eggs slide right off with barely any oil. The ceramic surface heats evenly and the handle stays cool on the hob. Beautiful caramel colour too. Very pleased with this purchase.

reviews.title: Good everyday frying pan
reviews.reviewText: Non-stick surface works great and it heats evenly on my induction hob. I wish it were dishwasher safe but the non-stick quality is worth the hand wash. Solid pan.

reviews.title: Great PFOA-free option
reviews.reviewText: Comfortable knowing this pan has no harmful coatings. The ceramic surface performs brilliantly and the oven-safe feature is a bonus. I use it for everything from eggs to searing.
